tasks.subject: Task 0: Proto Definitions & Compilation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define all file operation messages in protobuf and verify they compile to Rust + TypeScript types.

**Files:**
- Create: `proto/ahand/v1/file_ops.proto`
- Modify: `proto/ahand/v1/envelope.proto`
- Modify: `crates/ahand-protocol/build.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["proto/ahand/v1/file_ops.proto", "proto/ahand/v1/envelope.proto", "crates/ahand-protocol/build.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build -p ahand-protocol", "acceptanceCriteria": ["file_ops.proto contains all message types from spec", "envelope.proto has file_request = 31 and file_response = 32", "cargo build -p ahand-protocol succeeds", "TypeScript types generate without error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Daemon FileManager Skeleton, Config & Routing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create FileManager module structure, add file_policy config, wire up FileRequest routing.

**Files:**
- Create: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/mod.rs`
- Create: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/policy.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/config.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/main.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/ahand_client.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/Cargo.toml`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/mod.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/policy.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/config.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/main.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/ahand_client.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -- file_manager", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FilePolicyConfig parses from TOML", "FileManager::new() constructs", "FileRequest routing dispatches to handler", "Policy rejects paths outside allowlist", "Path traversal detected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: FileStat, FileList, FileGlob, FileMkdir
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement simplest file operations: metadata queries and directory creation.

**Files:**
- Create: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/fs_ops.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/mod.rs`
- Test: `crates/ahandd/tests/file_ops.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/fs_ops.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/file_ops.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -- fs_ops", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FileStat returns correct metadata", "FileList paginates correctly", "FileGlob matches patterns", "FileMkdir creates directories", "All respect file policy"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: FileReadText — Triple-Limit Text Pagination
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement text reading with triple-limit pagination, per-line truncation, precise position reporting.

**Files:**
- Create: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/text_read.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/mod.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/Cargo.toml` (encoding_rs, chardetng)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/text_read.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -- text_read", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Start position by line/byte/line_col works", "Stops at max_lines/max_bytes/target_end", "Per-line truncation with remaining_bytes", "PositionInfo accurate for start and end", "Encoding auto-detection works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: FileReadBinary & FileReadImage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement binary byte-range reading and image reading with on-device compression.

**Files:**
- Create: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/binary_read.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/mod.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/binary_read.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -- binary_read", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Binary read returns exact byte range", "Image resize preserves aspect ratio", "Image format conversion works", "Image max_bytes iteratively compresses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: FileWrite & FileEdit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement all write/edit operations: full write, append, string replace, line range, byte range.

**Files:**
- Create: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/write_ops.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/mod.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/write_ops.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -- write_ops", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FullWrite creates/overwrites files", "create_parents works", "StringReplace handles single/all/not-found/multiple", "LineRangeReplace works", "ByteRangeReplace works", "FileEdit rejects non-existent files"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: FileDelete, FileCopy, FileMove, FileCreateSymlink, FileChmod
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement remaining mutation operations with trash/permanent, recursive, platform permissions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/fs_ops.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/mod.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/file_manager/fs_ops.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -- fs_mutation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Delete TRASH moves to trash", "Delete PERMANENT removes", "Recursive delete works", "Copy/Move with overwrite control", "Symlink creation", "Chmod sets Unix mode", "Chmod recursive"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Hub HTTP Endpoints & Message Forwarding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add REST API on hub for file operations, handle FileResponse from devices.

**Files:**
- Create: `crates/ahand-hub/src/http/files.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahand-hub/src/http/mod.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahand-hub/src/ws/device_gateway.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahand-hub/src/state.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub/src/http/files.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/http/mod.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/ws/device_gateway.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/state.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build -p ahand-hub", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /api/devices/{id}/files forwards to device", "FileResponse routed back via request_id correlation", "Timeout returns 504", "Auth required"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: S3 Large File Transfer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement pre-signed URL flow for files exceeding transfer threshold.

**Files:**
- Modify: `crates/ahand-hub/Cargo.toml`
- Modify: `crates/ahand-hub/src/config.rs`
- Create: `crates/ahand-hub/src/s3.rs`
- Modify: `crates/ahand-hub/src/http/files.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub/src/s3.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/config.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/http/files.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build -p ahand-hub", "acceptanceCriteria": ["S3Config parses correctly", "Upload URL generation works", "Download URL generation works", "Hub uploads large responses to S3", "Hub downloads S3 content for large writes", "Graceful fallback when S3 not configured"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: End-to-End Integration Testing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify full pipeline: HTTP request → hub → daemon → filesystem → response.

**Files:**
- Create: `crates/ahandd/tests/file_ops_e2e.rs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/tests/file_ops_e2e.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd -- file_ops", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Full roundtrip works for all 13 operations", "Policy rejection returns POLICY_DENIED", "Session STRICT triggers approval", "Error cases return proper codes"]}
```
